description: Mexican drug trafficking organization originally allied with the Sinaloa Cartel, founded by the Beltrán Leyva brothers in Sinaloa. It split from the Sinaloa Cartel in 2008 and engaged in violent conflicts. The cartel was involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and murder. It was largely dismantled after the arrest of its last known leader in 2014, though some factions remain active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Estados Unidos : Arizona , Nevada , California , Texas , Nuevo México
country_links.context: The cartel has territory in multiple U.S. states, indicating it operates there.
